Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan17_100.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 100 parcels aligned to 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan17_100()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan17_100()
#> 
#> ── yan17_100 ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 100
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 100 × 3
#>     hemi  region                             label                              
#>     <chr> <chr>                              <chr>                              
#>   1 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp         lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp      
#>   2 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC         lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC      
#>   3 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC         lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC      
#>   4 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL         lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL      
#>   5 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1   
#>   6 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2   
#>   7 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1   
#>   8 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2   
#>   9 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_1   
#>  10 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_2   
#>  11 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL         lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL      
#>  12 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC         lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC      
#>  13 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd     
#>  14 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm     
#>  15 left  17networks_LH_ContC_PCC            lh_17networks_LH_ContC_PCC         
#>  16 left  17networks_LH_ContC_pCun           lh_17networks_LH_ContC_pCun        
#>  17 left  17networks_LH_ContB_FPole          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FPole       
#>  18 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1       
#>  19 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2       
#>  20 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv           lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv        
#>  21 left  17networks_LH_LimbicA_Temp         lh_17networks_LH_LimbicA_Temp      
#>  22 left  17networks_LH_LimbicA_TempPole     lh_17networks_LH_LimbicA_TempPole  
#>  23 left  17networks_LH_LimbicB_OFC          lh_17networks_LH_LimbicB_OFC       
#>  24 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_FrMed   lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_FrMed
#>  25 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_PFCl    lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_PFCl 
#>  26 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_1   lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_1
#>  27 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_2   lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_2
#>  28 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_SPL     lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_SPL  
#>  29 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PostC_1    lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PostC_1 
#>  30 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PostC_2    lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PostC_2 
#>  31 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrC        lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrC     
#>  32 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrCd       lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrCd    
#>  33 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_SPL        lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_SPL     
#>  34 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_SPL        lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_SPL     
#>  35 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc    lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc 
#>  36 left  17networks_LH_SomMotB_1            lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_1         
#>  37 left  17networks_LH_SomMotB_2            lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_2         
#>  38 left  17networks_LH_SomMotB_Ins          lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_Ins       
#>  39 left  17networks_LH_SomMotB_ParOper      lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_ParOper   
#>  40 left  17networks_LH_SomMotA_1            lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_1         
#>  41 left  17networks_LH_SomMotA_2            lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_2         
#>  42 left  17networks_LH_SomMotA_3            lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_3         
#>  43 left  17networks_LH_SomMotA_4            lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_4         
#>  44 left  17networks_LH_VisPeri_1            lh_17networks_LH_VisPeri_1         
#>  45 left  17networks_LH_VisPeri_2            lh_17networks_LH_VisPeri_2         
#>  46 left  17networks_LH_VisPeri_3            lh_17networks_LH_VisPeri_3         
#>  47 left  17networks_LH_VisCent_1            lh_17networks_LH_VisCent_1         
#>  48 left  17networks_LH_VisCent_2            lh_17networks_LH_VisCent_2         
#>  49 left  17networks_LH_VisCent_3            lh_17networks_LH_VisCent_3         
#>  50 left  17networks_LH_VisCent_4            lh_17networks_LH_VisCent_4         
#>  51 right 17networks_RH_TempPar_Temp         rh_17networks_RH_TempPar_Temp      
#>  52 right 17networks_RH_DefaultC_PHC         rh_17networks_RH_DefaultC_PHC      
#>  53 right 17networks_RH_DefaultC_RSC         rh_17networks_RH_DefaultC_RSC      
#>  54 right 17networks_RH_TempPar_IPL          rh_17networks_RH_TempPar_IPL       
#>  55 right 17networks_RH_DefaultB_PFCd_1      rh_17networks_RH_DefaultB_PFCd_1   
#>  56 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_PFCd    rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_PFCd 
#>  57 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_PFCv    rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_PFCv 
#>  58 right 17networks_RH_LimbicB_PFCv         rh_17networks_RH_LimbicB_PFCv      
#>  59 right 17networks_RH_DefaultB_Temp_1      rh_17networks_RH_DefaultB_Temp_1   
#>  60 right 17networks_RH_ContB_Temp           rh_17networks_RH_ContB_Temp        
#>  61 right 17networks_RH_ContB_IPL            rh_17networks_RH_ContB_IPL         
#>  62 right 17networks_RH_DefaultA_PCC         rh_17networks_RH_DefaultA_PCC      
#>  63 right 17networks_RH_ContB_PFCd           rh_17networks_RH_ContB_PFCd        
#>  64 right 17networks_RH_DefaultA_PFCm        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultA_PFCm     
#>  65 right 17networks_RH_ContC_PCC            rh_17networks_RH_ContC_PCC         
#>  66 right 17networks_RH_ContC_pCun           rh_17networks_RH_ContC_pCun        
#>  67 right 17networks_RH_ContB_FPole          rh_17networks_RH_ContB_FPole       
#>  68 right 17networks_RH_ContA_IPS_1          rh_17networks_RH_ContA_IPS_1       
#>  69 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_IPS        rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_IPS     
#>  70 right 17networks_RH_ContA_PrCv           rh_17networks_RH_ContA_PrCv        
#>  71 right 17networks_RH_LimbicA_Temp         rh_17networks_RH_LimbicA_Temp      
#>  72 right 17networks_RH_LimbicA_TempPole     rh_17networks_RH_LimbicA_TempPole  
#>  73 right 17networks_RH_LimbicB_OFC          rh_17networks_RH_LimbicB_OFC       
#>  74 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_FrMed   rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_FrMed
#>  75 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_PFCl    rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnB_PFCl 
#>  76 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_1   rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_1
#>  77 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_2   rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_Ins_2
#>  78 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_SPL     rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_SPL  
#>  79 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PostC_1    rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PostC_1 
#>  80 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PostC_2    rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PostC_2 
#>  81 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PrC        rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PrC     
#>  82 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PrCd       rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PrCd    
#>  83 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_SPL        rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_SPL     
#>  84 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_SPL        rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_SPL     
#>  85 right 17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc    rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc 
#>  86 right 17networks_RH_SomMotB_1            rh_17networks_RH_SomMotB_1         
#>  87 right 17networks_RH_SomMotB_2            rh_17networks_RH_SomMotB_2         
#>  88 right 17networks_RH_SomMotB_Ins          rh_17networks_RH_SomMotB_Ins       
#>  89 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_ParOper rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA_ParO…
#>  90 right 17networks_RH_SomMotA_1            rh_17networks_RH_SomMotA_1         
#>  91 right 17networks_RH_SomMotA_2            rh_17networks_RH_SomMotA_2         
#>  92 right 17networks_RH_SomMotA_3            rh_17networks_RH_SomMotA_3         
#>  93 right 17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA         rh_17networks_RH_SalVentAttnA      
#>  94 right 17networks_RH_VisPeri_1            rh_17networks_RH_VisPeri_1         
#>  95 right 17networks_RH_VisPeri_2            rh_17networks_RH_VisPeri_2         
#>  96 right 17networks_RH_VisPeri_3            rh_17networks_RH_VisPeri_3         
#>  97 right 17networks_RH_VisCent_1            rh_17networks_RH_VisCent_1         
#>  98 right 17networks_RH_VisCent_2            rh_17networks_RH_VisCent_2         
#>  99 right 17networks_RH_VisCent_3            rh_17networks_RH_VisCent_3         
#> 100 right 17networks_RH_VisCent_4            rh_17networks_RH_VisCent_4         
plot(yan17_100())
